component.name: Skout
component.summary: An open-source clone of the board game Skout

description.p: Skout is a digital implementation of the popular circus-themed card game. In this game, you are a circus leader trying to put together the best show by recruiting members from other circuses while managing your own troupe.

ul.li: Fast-paced card game strategy with complex decision-making
Clean, modern Qt-based interface following KDE design principles
Intelligent AI opponents with adaptive difficulty
